name: pago-optimizer
description: Pago internal — 9-question productivity audit for Office/Cowork usage. Returns 3 ranked recommendations.
author: Pago Engineering <eng@pago.ro>

metadata.telemetry_note: This skill emits NO telemetry. Org-level Office/Cowork OTel events flow independently to the Pago collector based on org admin Settings → Monitoring config.
metadata.privacy_note: Skill does not read, store, or transmit user input outside the conversation.
